message:
test(pt-core,pt-config): expand no-mock coverage for validation, supervision, calibration

pt-config/validate.rs: 41 new tests (2→43) covering ValidationError codes
and display, validate_beta_params, validate_gamma_params, validate_priors
(sum, negative prob, bad beta/gamma in each class, schema version),
validate_policy (fdr, robot posterior, guardrails, loss matrix, schema),
validate_load_aware (disabled, weights, thresholds, multipliers).

supervision/types.rs: 42 new tests (5→47) covering SupervisorCategory
display/serde, EvidenceType display/serde, AncestryEntry serde,
SupervisionEvidence, SupervisionResult constructors/serde,
SupervisorPattern/Database construction/defaults, find_matches for all
16 default patterns (claude, codex, aider, cursor, vscode, jetbrains,
nvim, github-actions, gitlab-runner, jenkins, tmux, screen, systemd,
launchd, pm2, supervisord), partial/empty match guards, invariants.

calibrate/report.rs: 29 new tests (4→33) covering ConfusionMatrix
(default, zero metrics, perfect, f1 symmetry, serde), generate_summary
(all 4 quality levels), CalibrationReport (json validity, ascii sections,
quality badge, no-bounds case, serde roundtrip, insufficient data),
SignatureCalibrationData serde, analyze_signature_calibration (empty,
single/multi sig, confusion matrix, needs_review, threshold, metrics).

bead: process_triage-aii.7

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
